metadata.description: Trigger ISRU production chain (TEU/PVE/Gas Separator) to produce initial batch of processed regolith and cryo-fuels for Mission 2 construction materials.
metadata.intended_usage: Reference in mission profiles to initiate ISRU stockpiling during phase transitions.
metadata.author: AI Copilot

tasks.name: ISRU Stockpile Production Initiation
tasks.description: Mark ISRU units as producing and initialize first production cycle. Tracks material output (regolith, volatiles, O2, H2, cryo-gases) to settlement inventory. This is a simulation trigger event, not real-time production.
